mapper.insert:
select bmLine_seq.nextval from dual
insert into bm_line(id,order_id,book_id) values(#{id},#{order.id},#{book.id})
mapper.select: select book.id,o.id oid, book.bookName,book.publishHouse,book.publishTime,o.orderDate from bm_line line,bm_book book,bm_order o where line.book_id = book.id and line.order_id = o.id and line.order_id = #{id}
